name: React JS
description: Learn to build dynamic, component-based web applications using React JS, managing state, props, and hooks effectively.

name: Node JS
description: Master backend development with Node JS, creating servers, REST APIs, and connecting applications to databases.

name: HTML
description: Understand the structure of web pages and build semantic HTML layouts for modern web applications.

name: CSS
description: Design visually appealing and responsive web pages using advanced CSS techniques including Flexbox, Grid, and animations.

name: JavaScript
description: Gain expertise in core JavaScript concepts, DOM manipulation, event handling, and creating interactive web experiences.

name: NextJS
description: Learn server-side rendering, static site generation, and modern web application development using the Next.js framework.

name: MongoDB
description: Master MongoDB database design, CRUD operations, aggregation, and building scalable applications with NoSQL.
